jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Symbiosis Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Symbiosis Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Symbiosis Hospital:
Symbiosis Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Symbiosis Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
